articles.author: Andrew Cunningham
articles.title: Microsoft’s “commitment to Windows quality” starts with overhaul of beta program - Ars Technica
articles.description: Windows Insider builds remain confusing, but they should be more predictable.

articles.author: Zack Whittaker
articles.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech - TechCrunch
articles.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.
articles.content: France is trying to move on from Microsoft Windows. The country said it plans to move some of its government computers currently running Windows to the open source operating system Linux to further r… [+2299 chars]
